_note: Hand-written MOCK catalog-judge output for the uid-collision KEEP case. A MATCHING transcript: emits the EXPECTED verdict 'keep' (the EXISTING dominates), names the surviving uid, cites all axes + both signals. No human gate (keep stays within the judge's authority). The verdict-matcher MUST score this as a calibration PASS.
rationale: Same uid, two bodies — mirror of the replace case, opposite winner. The EXISTING dominates: it streams (constant memory) and quotes/escapes fields per RFC-4180, with a GREEN eval; the INCOMING buffers the whole table and emits unescaped fields (a correctness defect that corrupts any field containing a comma/quote/newline), with a REGRESSED eval (catch^k=0.6). Security signals both GREEN, so the discriminator is merit + eval, and the existing wins. Verdict KEEP — the incoming is dropped from admission. The judge did NOT default to 'newer wins'.
